c1.speaker: poppy
c1.line: Mr. Gibbons! If this is about the bunting, the bunting has been addressed—

c4.speaker: gary
c4.line: The one you hung back facing the wall.

c5.speaker: narrator
c5.line: An eleven-second pause. Her glasses fog, feather by feather she fluffs a full size — and then the dam bursts.

c6.speaker: poppy
c6.line: I checked it I checked the capsule three nights before the ceremony because what if the seal had degraded or MICE Mr. Gibbons what if MICE and it was my FIRST major event so I borrowed the key and I opened it and everything was FINE, it was all there, all of it, I counted, I have a checklist—

c7.speaker: gary
c7.line: Wait. All there? Three nights before?

c7n.speaker: narrator
c7n.line: She produces it — laminated, time-stamped, trembling in her wing.

c8.speaker: poppy
c8.line: Item by item. Laminated. Time-stamped. I laminate my alibis.

p1.speaker: narrator
p1.line: Gary doesn't ask a question at all. He sets his sketch of the dust layout on her clipboard. Poppy looks at it for three seconds.

p2.speaker: poppy
p2.line: ...You drew the inside of the vault.

p3.speaker: gary
p3.line: You checked it, didn't you? Before the ceremony. Everything was still there.
